title: SynthID, our imperceptible watermark for AI-generated content, is expanding to more partners.
summary: SynthID is an imperceptible watermarking technology developed by Google DeepMind for identifying AI-generated content. The tool is expanding to more partners, broadening its adoption across the AI industry.
